title: cicerbita orbelica
intro: Cicerbita orbelica, also known as Orbelia or Orbelica, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cicerbita orbelica include its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, kidney stones, and urinary tract infections. Cicerbita orbelica can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
